seo.title: About BEATROX — Experiential Design & Event Production
seo.description: Beatrox LLC is a Portland, OR-based team of imaginative storytellers, engineers, designers, and technologists who build world-class experiential events and immersive environments.

og.title: About BEATROX
og.description: A Portland-based team of creators, engineers, designers, and technologists building world-class experiential events and immersive environments.

hero.headline: Who Are We
hero.subheadline: We are a team of imaginative storytellers who use technology to bring worlds to life.

sections.heading: Our Story
sections.body:
Beatrox was founded in Portland, Oregon with a single conviction: any idea, no matter how unconventional, is achievable. What started as a small collective of designers and technologists has grown into a full-service experiential design and event production company trusted by some of the world's most iconic brands.

With over 20 years of combined industry experience, our team has designed and produced events across the United States and internationally — from immersive retail activations for Adidas to large-scale stage fabrication for worldwide tours.

columns.heading: Who We Are
columns.body: A diverse collective of creators, engineers, designers, architects, and technologists. We believe the best work happens when every discipline is at the table, collaborating toward a shared vision.

columns.heading: What We Do
columns.body: Our services span the full spectrum of experiential production: environmental design, LED and projection systems, custom fabrication, interactive media, drone and laser shows, and turnkey event management.

columns.heading: How We Do It
columns.body: Collaboration is the foundation of everything we build. We work openly with our clients and partners at every stage — from first concept to final strike — to ensure the work exceeds expectations every time.

items.title: Creativity Without Limits
items.body: We believe any idea is achievable. Our team constantly experiments with emerging tools and technologies to ensure our clients get the most innovative solutions possible.

items.title: Technical Excellence
items.body: From engineering certification to media server programming, our technical standards are uncompromising. Every build is designed to be safe, reliable, and spectacular.

items.title: Human Connection
items.body: Technology is our tool, not our goal. Every experience we create is designed to evoke genuine emotion and create lasting memories for audiences.

items.title: True Collaboration
items.body: We are partners, not vendors. We immerse ourselves in each client's vision, working side-by-side to make great work that inspires wonder.

sections.heading: Let's Build Something Together
sections.body: Our team is ready to help you create something truly extraordinary. Book a discovery call and get professional advice today.
